title: Monday service onboarding essentials
excerpt: Setting up monday service the right way is what drives long-term success. In this webinar, you’ll learn how to configure your monday service account with proven best practices that increase satisfaction, speed up adoptio…

posts.author: Omer (Omer Fast)
posts.cookedHtml:
Setting up monday service the right way is what drives long-term success. In this webinar, you’ll learn how to configure your monday service account with proven best practices that increase satisfaction, speed up adoption, and support a smooth path from trial to paid account.
